VBA MACRO Module3.bas 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/Module3'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ===========================================================================
' ?? VARIABLES GLOBALES DE MEMORIA (SIEMPRE VAN HASTA ARRIBA)
' ===========================================================================
Public EnModoCambio As Boolean   ' Interruptor: TRUE si falta entregar feria al cliente
Public CambioObligatorio As Double ' Guarda en memoria cu├ínta feria se le debe dar al cliente
Public PiezasRecibidas(1 To 10) As Long ' Guarda temporalmente el arqueo inicial del Paso 1
Public ArqueoRealizado As Boolean ' Candado de ├║nica ejecuci├│n del bloqueo diario

' ===========================================================================
' ? 1. MACRO PRINCIPAL: PROCESADOR DE EFECTIVO Y PAGO ELECTR├ôNICO
' ===========================================================================
Sub Macro1()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim wsB As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim lastRow As Long, proximaFilaB4 As Long, filaNuevaBN As Long
    Dim valorM7 As String, valorM8 As String, valorM9 As String, valorN8 As String
    Dim valorN5 As String, valorN6 As String, valorN4 As String
    Dim userCode As String, userName As String
    Dim bgColor As Long
    Dim montoOperacion As Double
    Dim inputsActivos As Long

    ' Leer valores de todas las celdas limpiando espacios muertos
    valorM7 = Trim(ws.Range("M7").Value)
    valorM8 = Trim(ws.Range("M8").Value)
    valorM9 = Trim(ws.Range("M9").Value)
    valorN8 = Trim(ws.Range("N8").Value)
    valorN5 = Trim(ws.Range("N5").Value)
    valorN6 = Trim(ws.Range("N6").Value)
    valorN4 = Trim(ws.Range("N4").Value)

    ' =======================================================================
    ' ?? MOTOR DE INVENTARIO EN TIEMPO REAL (ESCANEO DE BIT├üCORA "BILLETES")
    ' =======================================================================
    Dim inv1000 As Long, inv500 As Long, inv200 As Long, inv10 As Long
    Dim inv100 As Long, inv50 As Long, inv20 As Long
    Dim inv5 As Long, inv2 As Long, inv1 As Long
    Dim lastRB As Long, rB As Long
    
    inv1000 = 0: inv500 = 0: inv200 = 0: inv100 = 0: inv50 = 0: inv20 = 0
    inv10 = 0: inv5 = 0: inv2 = 0: inv1 = 0
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsB = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    If Not wsB Is Nothing Then
        lastRB = wsB.Cells(wsB.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
        For rB = 2 To lastRB
            Dim tMov As String
            tMov = LCase(Trim(wsB.Cells(rB, 13).Value))
            If tMov = "entrada" Or tMov = "registro" Or tMov = "cambio" Or tMov = "deposito" Or tMov = "recarga" Then
                inv1000 = inv1000 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 2).Value)
                inv500 = inv500 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 3).Value)
                inv200 = inv200 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 4).Value)
                inv100 = inv100 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 5).Value)
                inv50 = inv50 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 6).Value)
                inv20 = inv20 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 7).Value)
                inv10 = inv10 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 8).Value)
                inv5 = inv5 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 9).Value)
                inv2 = inv2 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 10).Value)
                inv1 = inv1 + Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 11).Value)
            ElseIf tMov = "retiro" Then
                inv1000 = inv1000 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 2).Value)
                inv500 = inv500 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 3).Value)
                inv200 = inv200 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 4).Value)
                inv100 = inv100 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 5).Value)
                inv50 = inv50 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 6).Value)
                inv20 = inv20 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 7).Value)
                inv10 = inv10 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 8).Value)
                inv5 = inv5 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 9).Value)
                inv2 = inv2 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 10).Value)
                inv1 = inv1 - Val(wsB.Cells(rB, 11).Value)
            End If
        Next rB
    End If

    ' =======================================================================
    ' ?? CONTROLADOR DE FLUJO INTELIGENTE (CANDADO DE EXCLUSIVIDAD)
    ' =======================================================================
    If EnModoCambio = False Then
        inputsActivos = 0
        
        ' Medir qu├® celdas contienen datos reales activos en este turno
        If valorM7 <> "" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorM8 <> "" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorM9 <> "" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorN4 <> "" And valorN4 <> "Transferencia" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorN8 <> "" And valorN8 <> "Banorte" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorN5 <> "" And valorN5 <> "Anexar" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1
        If valorN6 <> "" And valorN6 <> "BBVA" Then inputsActivos = inputsActivos + 1

        If inputsActivos > 1 Then
            MsgBox "┬íOperaci├│n Denegada! Tienes m├║ltiples celdas con datos activos. Procesa una sola opci├│n a la vez.", vbExclamation, "M├║ltiples Datos"
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        If inputsActivos = 0 Then
            MsgBox "No hay datos nuevos para procesar en este m├│dulo.", vbExclamation, "Sin Datos"
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        ' ?? RUTA: ANEXAR DINERO TRANSFERENCIA (N4) -> USERFORM13
        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        If valorN4 <> "" And valorN4 <> "Transferencia" Then
            UserForm13.lblTotalTransferencia.Caption = FormatCurrency(valorN4, 2)
            UserForm13.Show
            
            Dim respM4 As Boolean, motivoTransferencia As String, detallesTransferencia As String
            respM4 = UserForm13.Confirmado
            motivoTransferencia = UserForm13.MotivoSeleccionado
            detallesTransferencia = UserForm13.DetallesEscritos
            Unload UserForm13
            
            If respM4 = False Then: MsgBox "Operaci├│n cancelada.", vbInformation: GoTo Salida
            
            userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo de autorizaci├│n (N4):", "C├│digo")
            Select Case Trim(userCode)
                Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
                Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
                Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
                Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
                Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
                Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
                Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End Select
            
            If Not wsB Is Nothing Then
                If wsB.ProtectContents Then wsB.Unprotect Password:="12"
                proximaFilaB4 = wsB.Cells(wsB.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 1).Value = Now
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 12).Value = userName
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 13).Value = "Entrada"
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 14).Value = "Transferencia: " & motivoTransferencia
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 15).Value = detallesTransferencia
                wsB.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            End If
            
            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            ws.Range("M4").Value = Val(ws.Range("M4").Value) + CDbl(valorN4)
            
            ws.Range("N4").Value = "" ' Activa el Worksheet_Change para reponer la gu├¡a amarilla
            
            ' ??? REFORZAMIENTO DE SEGURIDAD SOLICITADO POR MIGUEL
            ws.Range("N4").Locked = False ' N4 queda completamente LIBRE para volver a anotar
            ws.Range("M4").Locked = True  ' M4 (Acumulador) queda totalmente BLOQUEADO
            
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            MsgBox "Transferencia registrada con ├®xito por " & userName & ".", vbInformation
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        ' ?? RUTA: METER VALOR EN CAJA (N5) -> USERFORM12
        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        If valorN5 <> "" And valorN5 <> "Anexar" Then
            Dim totalBilletesN5 As Double
            totalBilletesN5 = IIf(IsNumeric(ws.Range("M13").Value), ws.Range("M13").Value, 0)
            
            If totalBilletesN5 <> CDbl(valorN5) Then
                MsgBox "┬íNo se puede avanzar! El desglose de M13 debe ser IGUAL al monto en N5.", vbCritical, "Descuadre"
                GoTo Salida
            End If
            
            UserForm12.lblTotalEntrada.Caption = FormatCurrency(valorN5, 2)
            UserForm12.Show
            
            Dim respN5 As Boolean, motivoEntrada As String, detallesEntrada As String
            respN5 = UserForm12.Confirmado
            motivoEntrada = UserForm12.MotivoSeleccionado
            detallesEntrada = UserForm12.DetallesEscritos
            Unload UserForm12
            
            If respN5 = False Then: MsgBox "Cancelado.", vbInformation: GoTo Salida
            
            userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo:", "Usuario")
            Select Case Trim(userCode)
                Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
                Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
                Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
                Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
                Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
                Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
                Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End Select
            
            If Not wsB Is Nothing Then
                If wsB.ProtectContents Then wsB.Unprotect Password:="12"
                proximaFilaB4 = wsB.Cells(wsB.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 1).Value = Now
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 12).Value = userName
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 13).Value = "Entrada"
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 14).Value = motivoEntrada
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 15).Value = detallesEntrada
                wsB.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            End If
            
            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            ws.Range("M5").Value = Val(ws.Range("M5").Value) + CDbl(valorN5)
            ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16").Value = ""
            ws.Range("N5").Value = ""
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            MsgBox "Efectivo anexado con ├®xito.", vbInformation
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        ' ?? RUTA: PAGO BBVA (N6) -> CANDADO ANTI-NEGATIVOS INTEGRADO
        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        If valorN6 <> "" And valorN6 <> "BBVA" Then
            Dim totalBilletesN6 As Double
            totalBilletesN6 = IIf(IsNumeric(ws.Range("M13").Value), ws.Range("M13").Value, 0)
            
            If totalBilletesN6 <> CDbl(valorN6) Then
                MsgBox "┬íNo se puede avanzar! El desglose de M13 debe ser EXACTAMENTE IGUAL al monto solicitado en BBVA.", vbCritical, "Descuadre"
                GoTo Salida
            End If
            
            Dim faltaStockN6 As Boolean
            faltaStockN6 = False
            
            If Val(ws.Range("L12").Value) > inv1000 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("K12").Value) > inv500 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("J12").Value) > inv200 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("I12").Value) > inv100 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("H12").Value) > inv50 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("G12").Value) > inv20 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("J16").Value) > inv10 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("I16").Value) > inv5 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("H16").Value) > inv2 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("G16").Value) > inv1 Then faltaStockN6 = True
            
            If faltaStockN6 = True Then
                MsgBox "Operaci├│n Denegada. No cuentas con piezas suficientes en el historial de inventario f├¡sico para retirar este pago de BBVA.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock BBVA"
                On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
                ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16, N6").Value = ""
                ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
                GoTo Salida
            End If
            
            UserForm11.lblMensajeSalida.Caption = "┬┐CONFIRMA EL PAGO DE BBVA?" & vbCrLf & FormatCurrency(valorN6, 2)
            UserForm11.Show
            If UserForm11.Confirmado = False Then: Unload UserForm11: GoTo Salida
            Unload UserForm11
            
            userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo:", "C├│digo")
            Select Case Trim(userCode)
                Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
                Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
                Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
                Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
                Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
                Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
                Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End Select
            
            If Not wsB Is Nothing Then
                If wsB.ProtectContents Then wsB.Unprotect Password:="12"
                proximaFilaB4 = wsB.Cells(wsB.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 1).Value = Now
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 12).Value = userName
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 13).Value = "Retiro"
                wsB.Cells(proximaFilaB4, 14).Value = "Pago BBVA"
                wsB.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            End If
            
            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            ws.Range("M6").Value = Val(ws.Range("M6").Value) + CDbl(valorN6)
            ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16").Value = ""
            ws.Range("N6").Value = ""
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            MsgBox "Pago BBVA registrado en M6.", vbInformation
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        ' ?? RUTA: PAGO ELECTR├ôNICO BANORTE (N8)
        ' -------------------------------------------------------------------
        If valorN8 <> "" And valorN8 <> "Banorte" Then
            UserForm10.lblMensaje.Caption = "VENTA BANORTE " & FormatCurrency(valorN8, 2) & "?"
            UserForm10.Show
            If UserForm10.Confirmado = False Then: Unload UserForm10: GoTo Salida
            Unload UserForm10
            
            userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo:", "C├│digo")
            Select Case Trim(userCode)
                Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
                Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
                Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
                Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
                Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
                Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
                Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End Select

            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            filaNuevaBN = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row) + 1
            ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 17).Value = CDbl(valorN8)
            ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")
            ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 20).Value = userName
            ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor
            ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 21).Value = "BN"
            ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 17), ws.Cells(filaNuevaBN, 21)).Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
            
            ws.Range("N8").Value = ""
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            MsgBox "Terminal Banorte registrada.", vbInformation
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        ' ===================================================================
        ' ?? RUTA TRADICIONAL DE EFECTIVO (M7, M8, M9)
        ' ===================================================================
        If valorM7 <> "" Then montoOperacion = CDbl(valorM7)
        If valorM8 <> "" Then montoOperacion = CDbl(valorM8)
        If valorM9 <> "" Then montoOperacion = CDbl(valorM9)

        Dim totalBilletes As Double
        totalBilletes = IIf(IsNumeric(ws.Range("M13").Value), ws.Range("M13").Value, 0)

        ' Candado integrado estricto anti-negativos para retiros directos en M9
        If valorM9 <> "" Then
            Dim faltaStockM9 As Boolean
            faltaStockM9 = False
            
            If Val(ws.Range("L12").Value) > inv1000 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("K12").Value) > inv500 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("J12").Value) > inv200 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("I12").Value) > inv100 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("H12").Value) > inv50 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("G12").Value) > inv20 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("J16").Value) > inv10 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("I16").Value) > inv5 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("H16").Value) > inv2 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            If Val(ws.Range("G16").Value) > inv1 Then faltaStockM9 = True
            
            If faltaStockM9 = True Then
                MsgBox "Operaci├│n Denegada. No cuentas con piezas suficientes en el historial de inventario f├¡sico.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock"
                On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
                ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16, M7:M9").Value = ""
                ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
                GoTo Salida
            End If

            If totalBilletes <> montoOperacion Then
                MsgBox "Para un Retiro, el desglose de M13 debe ser EXACTAMENTE IGUAL al monto solicitado.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End If
        End If

        If valorM7 <> "" Or valorM8 <> "" Then
            If totalBilletes < montoOperacion Then
                MsgBox "Efectivo insuficiente desglosado en la tabla.", vbCritical: GoTo Salida
            End If
            CambioObligatorio = totalBilletes - montoOperacion
        ElseIf valorM9 <> "" Then
            CambioObligatorio = 0
        End If

        ' Si requiere cambio entra al Modo Retorno Limpio
        If CambioObligatorio > 0 Then
            PiezasRecibidas(1) = Val(ws.Range("L12").Value): PiezasRecibidas(2) = Val(ws.Range("K12").Value)
            PiezasRecibidas(3) = Val(ws.Range("J12").Value): PiezasRecibidas(4) = Val(ws.Range("I12").Value)
            PiezasRecibidas(5) = Val(ws.Range("H12").Value): PiezasRecibidas(6) = Val(ws.Range("G12").Value)
            PiezasRecibidas(7) = Val(ws.Range("J16").Value): PiezasRecibidas(8) = Val(ws.Range("I16").Value)
            PiezasRecibidas(9) = Val(ws.Range("H16").Value): PiezasRecibidas(10) = Val(ws.Range("G16").Value)

            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents
            ws.Range("K17").formula = "= " & CambioObligatorio & " - M13"
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            EnModoCambio = True

            MsgBox "El cliente requiere un cambio de: " & FormatCurrency(CambioObligatorio, 2) & vbCrLf & "Desglosa la feria en la charola y vuelve a presionar Guardar.", vbInformation
            GoTo Salida
        End If

        userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo:", "Usuario")
        Select Case Trim(userCode)
            Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
            Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
            Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
            Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
            Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
            Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
            Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbExclamation: GoTo Salida
        End Select

        On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
        lastRow = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row) + 1
        
        If valorM7 <> "" Then: UserForm3.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm3.Confirmado = False: UserForm3.Show
        If valorM8 <> "" Then: UserForm2.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm2.Confirmado = False: UserForm2.Show
        If valorM9 <> "" Then: UserForm1.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm1.Confirmado = False: UserForm1.Show

    Else
        ' ===================================================================
        ' ?? CAMINO 2: VALIDACI├ôN DEL CAMBIO ENTREGADO AL CLIENTE
        ' ===================================================================
        Dim totalCambioEntregado As Double
        Dim faltaStock As Boolean
        faltaStock = False
        
        If Val(ws.Range("L12").Value) > inv1000 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("K12").Value) > inv500 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("J12").Value) > inv200 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("I12").Value) > inv100 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("H12").Value) > inv50 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("G12").Value) > inv20 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("J16").Value) > inv10 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("I16").Value) > inv5 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("H16").Value) > inv2 Then faltaStock = True
        If Val(ws.Range("G16").Value) > inv1 Then faltaStock = True

        If faltaStock = True Then
            MsgBox "No hay piezas suficientes en el inventario real para entregar ese cambio.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock"
            On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
            ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16, M7:M9").Value = ""
            ws.Range("K17").formula = "=M13-M7-M8-M9-IF(ISNUMBER(N5),N5,0)-IF(ISNUMBER(N6),N6,0)"
            ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
            EnModoCambio = False: GoTo Salida
        End If

        totalCambioEntregado = (Val(ws.Range("L12").Value) * 1000) + (Val(ws.Range("K12").Value) * 500) + _
                               (Val(ws.Range("J12").Value) * 200) + (Val(ws.Range("I12").Value) * 100) + _
                               (Val(ws.Range("H12").Value) * 50) + (Val(ws.Range("G12").Value) * 20) + _
                               (Val(ws.Range("J16").Value) * 10) + (Val(ws.Range("I16").Value) * 5) + _
                               (Val(ws.Range("H16").Value) * 2) + (Val(ws.Range("G16").Value) * 1)
                               
        If totalCambioEntregado <> CambioObligatorio Then
            MsgBox "El desglose no coincide con el cambio obligatorio de " & FormatCurrency(CambioObligatorio, 2), vbCritical
            GoTo Salida
        End If
        
        userCode = InputBox("C├│digo para cerrar la operaci├│n y guardar:", "C├│digo")
        Select Case Trim(userCode)
            Case "20": userName = "Ingrid": bgColor = RGB(173, 216, 230)
            Case "64": userName = "Leticia": bgColor = RGB(144, 238, 144)
            Case "02": userName = "Miguel": bgColor = RGB(255, 223, 186)
            Case "86": userName = "Dita": bgColor = RGB(216, 191, 216)
            Case "26": userName = "Yoyis": bgColor = RGB(255, 255, 153)
            Case "15": userName = "Mabeli": bgColor = RGB(255, 129, 129)
            Case Else
                MsgBox "Cancelado. Devolviendo los billetes recibidos originalmente.", vbExclamation
                On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
                ws.Range("L12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(1): ws.Range("K12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(2)
                ws.Range("J12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(3): ws.Range("I12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(4)
                ws.Range("H12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(5): ws.Range("G12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(6)
                ws.Range("J16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(7): ws.Range("I16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(8)
                ws.Range("H16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(9): ws.Range("G16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(10)
                ws.Range("K17").formula = "=M13-M7-M8-M9-IF(ISNUMBER(N5),N5,0)-IF(ISNUMBER(N6),N6,0)"
                ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
                EnModoCambio = False: GoTo Salida
        End Select
        
        On Error Resume Next: ws.Unprotect Password:="12": On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
        ws.Range("L12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(1) - Val(ws.Range("L12").Value)
        ws.Range("K12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(2) - Val(ws.Range("K12").Value)
        ws.Range("J12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(3) - Val(ws.Range("J12").Value)
        ws.Range("I12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(4) - Val(ws.Range("I12").Value)
        ws.Range("H12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(5) - Val(ws.Range("H12").Value)
        ws.Range("G12").Value = PiezasRecibidas(6) - Val(ws.Range("G12").Value)
        ws.Range("J16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(7) - Val(ws.Range("J16").Value)
        ws.Range("I16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(8) - Val(ws.Range("I16").Value)
        ws.Range("H16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(9) - Val(ws.Range("H16").Value)
        ws.Range("G16").Value = PiezasRecibidas(10) - Val(ws.Range("G16").Value)
        
        ws.Range("K17").formula = "=M13-M7-M8-M9-IF(ISNUMBER(N5),N5,0)-IF(ISNUMBER(N6),N6,0)"
        lastRow = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row) + 1
        EnModoCambio = False
        
        If valorM7 <> "" Then: UserForm3.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm3.Confirmado = False: UserForm3.Show
        If valorM8 <> "" Then: UserForm2.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm2.Confirmado = False: UserForm2.Show
        If valorM9 <> "" Then: UserForm1.Tag = lastRow & "|" & userName & "|" & bgColor: UserForm1.Confirmado = False: UserForm1.Show
    End If

' ? EL ANCLA TOTAL: Toda operaci├│n cae aqu├¡ y se amarra a "contador"
Salida:
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Activate
    On Error GoTo 0
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Exit Sub

' ? EL ANCLA EN CASO DE ERROR: Si algo truena, regresamos de forma segura
ErrorHandler:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True: EnModoCambio = False
    On Error Resume Next
    ws.Activate
    ws.Range("K17").formula = "=M13-M7-M8-M9-IF(ISNUMBER(N5),N5,0)-IF(ISNUMBER(N6),N6,0)"
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    MsgBox "Error: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ?? 2. MACRO DE RESET Y LIMPIEZA GENERAL COMPLETA (FIN DE TURNO)
' ===========================================================================
Sub LimpiarDatos()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    If MsgBox("┬┐Desea limpiar los datos de la sesi├│n actual?", vbYesNo + vbQuestion) = vbNo Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim ws As Worksheet, wsBilletes As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")
    Dim lastRow As Long, lastRowMeli As Long, lastRowBilletes As Long, c As Integer
    Dim rng As Range
    
    If ws.ProtectContents Then ws.Unprotect Password:="12"
    
    EnModoCambio = False: CambioObligatorio = 0
    ws.Range("K17").formula = "=M13-M7-M8-M9-IF(ISNUMBER(N5),N5,0)-IF(ISNUMBER(N6),N6,0)"
    ArqueoRealizado = False
    
    lastRow = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 2).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 4).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 5).End(xlUp).Row)
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        Set rng = ws.Range("A2:E" & lastRow): rng.ClearContents: rng.Borders.LineStyle = xlNone
        ws.Range("D2:D" & lastRow).Interior.ColorIndex = xlNone
    End If

    lastRowMeli = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max(ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row)
    If lastRowMeli >= 2 Then
        Set rng = ws.Range("Q2:U" & lastRowMeli): rng.ClearContents: rng.Borders.LineStyle = xlNone
        ws.Range("T2:T" & lastRowMeli).Interior.ColorIndex = xlNone
    End If
    
    On Error Resume Next: Set wsBilletes = Sheets("billetes"): On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    If Not wsBilletes Is Nothing Then
        If wsBilletes.ProtectContents Then wsBilletes.Unprotect Password:="12"
        lastRowBilletes = 1
        For c = 1 To 15
            If wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, c).End(xlUp).Row > lastRowBilletes Then lastRowBilletes = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, c).End(xlUp).Row
        Next c
        If lastRowBilletes >= 2 Then wsBilletes.Range("A2:O" & lastRowBilletes).ClearContents
        wsBilletes.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    
    ws.Range("M7:M9, M3:M6, N5:N6, I5:I6, G12:L12, G16:J16").Value = ""
    ws.Range("N4, N5, N6, N8").Value = ""
    
    ' ?? MATRIZ DE PROTECCI├ôN: N4 abierta y acumuladores bloqueados
    ws.Cells.Locked = True
    ws.Range("M7:M9, N4, N8, N5:N6, G12:L12, G16:J16, I5:I6").Locked = False
    ws.Range("M3, M4, M5, M6").Locked = True
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ws.Activate
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Sistema reiniciado.", vbInformation
    Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Error en Limpieza: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ?? 3. MACRO DE ARQUEO GENERAL DIARIO
' ===========================================================================
Sub BloquearDesbloquearCeldas()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False

    Dim ws As Worksheet, wsDestino As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    Dim userCode As String, userName As String

    If ArqueoRealizado = True Then
        MsgBox "El arqueo general del d├¡a de hoy ya fue blindado.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    End If

    If ws.Range("I6").Value <> ws.Range("M13").Value Then
        MsgBox "Error de Arqueo. El total f├¡sico desglosado en M13 no coincide con la celda I6.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    End If

    If Trim(ws.Range("I5").Value) = "" Or Trim(ws.Range("I6").Value) = "" Then
        MsgBox "Faltan datos obligatorios en las celdas I5 o I6.", vbExclamation: Exit Sub
    End If

    userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo para archivar el arqueo general:", "Bloqueo")
    Select Case Trim(userCode)
        Case "20": userName = "Ingrid"
        Case "64": userName = "Leticia"
        Case "02": userName = "Miguel"
        Case "86": userName = "Dita"
        Case "26": userName = "Yoyis"
        Case "15": userName = "Mabeli"
        Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido.", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    End Select

    On Error Resume Next: Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes"): On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    If wsDestino Is Nothing Then MsgBox "Hoja 'billetes' faltante.", vbCritical: Exit Sub

    If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
    proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName
    wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "registro"
    wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    If ws.ProtectContents Then ws.Unprotect Password:="12"
    ws.Range("G12:L12, G16:J16").Value = ""
    
    ' ?? MATRIZ DE PROTECCI├ôN OPERATIVA: N4 libre y acumuladores bloqueados
    ws.Cells.Locked = True
    ws.Range("M7:M9, N4, N8, N5:N6, G12:L12, G16:J16").Locked = False
    ws.Range("M3, M4, M5, M6, I5:I6").Locked = True
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    ArqueoRealizado = True
    ws.Activate
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Arqueo guardado e hist├│rico blindado con ├®xito.", vbInformation
    Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    MsgBox "Error: " & Err.Description, vbCritical
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ?? 4. DESPERTAR EXCEL (CANDADO DE SEGURIDAD EN EMERGENCIAS)
' ===========================================================================
Sub DespertarExcel()
    Application.EnableEvents = True
    MsgBox "Eventos y marcas de agua reactivados con ├®xito.", vbInformation
End Sub

VBA MACRO Hoja1.cls 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/Hoja1'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ========================================================================
' ??? 1. SENSOR DE POSICIONAMIENTO (SELECCI├ôN DE CELDA)
' Limpia la celda al entrar y restaura el texto gu├¡a si te vas dej├índola vac├¡a
' ========================================================================
Private Sub Worksheet_SelectionChange(ByVal Target As Range)
    Dim cellN4 As Range, cellN5 As Range, cellN6 As Range, cellN8 As Range
    
    On Error GoTo ResetEvents
    ' Apagar eventos temporalmente para evitar ejecuciones c├¡clicas
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    Set cellN4 = Range("N4")
    Set cellN5 = Range("N5")
    Set cellN6 = Range("N6")
    Set cellN8 = Range("N8")
    
    ' --------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' ?? AL ENTRAR: Si el operador hace clic y est├í la gu├¡a, la desvanecemos
    ' --------------------------------------------------------------------
    If Not Intersect(Target, cellN4) Is Nothing Then
        If cellN4.Value = "Transferencia" Then
            cellN4.Value = ""
            cellN4.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255) ' Fondo Blanco Limpio
            cellN4.Font.Bold = False
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, cellN5) Is Nothing Then
        If cellN5.Value = "Anexar" Then
            cellN5.Value = ""
            cellN5.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            cellN5.Font.Bold = False
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, cellN6) Is Nothing Then
        If cellN6.Value = "BBVA" Then
            cellN6.Value = ""
            cellN6.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            cellN6.Font.Bold = False
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, cellN8) Is Nothing Then
        If cellN8.Value = "Banorte" Then
            cellN8.Value = ""
            cellN8.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 255)
            cellN8.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cellN8.Font.Bold = False
        End If
    End If
    
    ' --------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' ?? AL SALIR: Si el operador cambia de celda y la dej├│ vac├¡a, regresa la gu├¡a
    ' --------------------------------------------------------------------
    If Intersect(Target, cellN4) Is Nothing Then
        If Trim(cellN4.Value) = "" Then
            cellN4.Value = "Transferencia"
            cellN4.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 0) ' Amarillo Gu├¡a
            cellN4.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cellN4.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Intersect(Target, cellN5) Is Nothing Then
        If Trim(cellN5.Value) = "" Then
            cellN5.Value = "Anexar"
            cellN5.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 0) ' Amarillo Gu├¡a
            cellN5.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cellN5.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Intersect(Target, cellN6) Is Nothing Then
        If Trim(cellN6.Value) = "" Then
            cellN6.Value = "BBVA"
            cellN6.Interior.Color = RGB(0, 176, 240) ' Azul Cyan Gu├¡a
            cellN6.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cellN6.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Intersect(Target, cellN8) Is Nothing Then
        If Trim(cellN8.Value) = "" Then
            cellN8.Value = "Banorte"
            cellN8.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 180, 180) ' Rojo Banorte Claro
            cellN8.Font.Color = RGB(150, 0, 0)
            cellN8.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If

ResetEvents:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 2. SENSOR DE EDICI├ôN DIRECTA (RESPALDO MANUAL)
' Respaldo de seguridad por si borran el valor de golpe con la tecla Suprimir
' ========================================================================
Private Sub Worksheet_Change(ByVal Target As Range)
    Dim cell As Range
    On Error GoTo ResetEvents
    Application.EnableEvents = False
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, Range("N4")) Is Nothing Then
        Set cell = Range("N4")
        If Trim(cell.Value) = "" Then
            cell.Value = "Transferencia"
            cell.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 0)
            cell.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cell.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, Range("N5")) Is Nothing Then
        Set cell = Range("N5")
        If Trim(cell.Value) = "" Then
            cell.Value = "Anexar"
            cell.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 255, 0)
            cell.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cell.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, Range("N6")) Is Nothing Then
        Set cell = Range("N6")
        If Trim(cell.Value) = "" Then
            cell.Value = "BBVA"
            cell.Interior.Color = RGB(0, 176, 240)
            cell.Font.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            cell.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If
    
    If Not Intersect(Target, Range("N8")) Is Nothing Then
        Set cell = Range("N8")
        If Trim(cell.Value) = "" Then
            cell.Value = "Banorte"
            cell.Interior.Color = RGB(255, 180, 180)
            cell.Font.Color = RGB(150, 0, 0)
            cell.Font.Bold = True
        End If
    End If

ResetEvents:
    Application.EnableEvents = True
End Sub
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO UserForm1.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm1'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Public Confirmado As Boolean

Private Sub CommandButton1_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim filaOriginal As Long
    filaOriginal = CLng(datos(0))

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' ?? FILA NUEVA INDEPENDIENTE (QÔÇôU)
    Dim filaNueva As Long
    filaNueva = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max( _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row _
                ) + 1

    If filaNueva < 2 Then filaNueva = 2

    ' GUARDAR EN CONTADOR
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 18).Value = ws.Range("M9").Value
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21).Value = "Tconecta R"

    ' BORRAR ORIGINAL
    ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaOriginal, 1), ws.Cells(filaOriginal, 5)).ClearContents

    ' BORDES
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17), ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ========================================================
    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES MANDATORIO
    ' ========================================================
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        ' Mapeo exacto e invertido a la bit├ícora hist├│rica
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Retiro"                   ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO ??
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    ' ========================================================

    ' LIMPIAR PANTALLA PRINCIPAL
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub


Private Sub CommandButton2_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim fila As Long
    fila = CLng(datos(0))

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' ?? PASAR M9 A COLUMNA B
    ws.Cells(fila, 2).Value = ws.Range("M9").Value

    ws.Cells(fila, 5).Value = "Retiro Yastas"
    ws.Cells(fila, 3).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")

    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Interior.Color = bgColor

    ' BORDES AÔÇôE
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(fila, 1), ws.Cells(fila, 5))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ========================================================
    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES MANDATORIO
    ' ========================================================
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Retiro"                   ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO ??
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    ' ========================================================

    ' LIMPIAR PANTALLA PRINCIPAL
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub


Private Sub CommandButton3_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim filaOriginal As Long
    filaOriginal = CLng(datos(0))

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' ?? FILA NUEVA (QÔÇôU)
    Dim filaMeli As Long
    filaMeli = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max( _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row _
                ) + 1

    If filaMeli < 2 Then filaMeli = 2

    ' GUARDAR DESDE M9
    ws.Cells(filaMeli, 18).Value = ws.Range("M9").Value
    ws.Cells(filaMeli, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")
    ws.Cells(filaMeli, 20).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(filaMeli, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor
    ws.Cells(filaMeli, 21).Value = "Meli"

    ' BORRAR ORIGINAL
    ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaOriginal, 1), ws.Cells(filaOriginal, 5)).ClearContents

    ' BORDES
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaMeli, 17), ws.Cells(filaMeli, 21))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ========================================================
    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES MANDATORIO
    ' ========================================================
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Retiro"                   ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO ??
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    ' ========================================================

    ' LIMPIAR PANTALLA PRINCIPAL
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)
    If CloseMode = 0 Then
        Confirmado = False
    End If
End Sub

Public Confirmado As Boolean

' =========================================================
' BOT├ôN 1 (YASTAS) -> Sigue guardando en hoja "billetes"
' =========================================================
Private Sub CommandButton1_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim fila As Long
    fila = CLng(datos(0))

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' TOMAR VALOR DE M8 A COLUMNA A
    ws.Cells(fila, 1).Value = ws.Range("M8").Value

    ws.Cells(fila, 5).Value = "Dep├│sito Yastas"
    ws.Cells(fila, 3).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")

    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Interior.Color = bgColor

    ' BORDES AÔÇôE
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(fila, 1), ws.Cells(fila, 5))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES (DEPOSITO)
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Deposito"                 ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If

    ' LIMPIAR
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub

Private Sub CommandButton3_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' FILA NUEVA EN QÔÇôU

    filaNueva = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max( _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row _
                ) + 1

    If filaNueva < 2 Then filaNueva = 2

    ' USAR M8
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17).Value = ws.Range("M8").Value
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21).Value = "BN"

    ' BORDES
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17), ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ?? LIMPIAR PANTALLA DIRECTAMENTE (Sin imprimir desglose en hoja billetes)
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub

VBA MACRO UserForm3.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm3'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' =========================================================
' VARIABLE GLOBAL
' =========================================================
Public Confirmado As Boolean


' =========================================================
' BOT├ôN 1 (YASTAS ? AÔÇôE)
' =========================================================
Private Sub CommandButton1_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim fila As Long
    fila = CLng(datos(0))

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' ?? TOMAR DIRECTO DE M7
    ws.Cells(fila, 1).Value = ws.Range("M7").Value

    ' TIPO
    ws.Cells(fila, 5).Value = "Recarga Yastas"

    ' HORA
    ws.Cells(fila, 3).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")

    ' USUARIO
    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(fila, 4).Interior.Color = bgColor

    ' ?? BORDES AÔÇôE COMPLETOS
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(fila, 1), ws.Cells(fila, 5))
        .Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlInsideVertical).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ========================================================
    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES (RECARGA)
    ' ========================================================
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        ' Mapeo exacto e invertido a la bit├ícora
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Recarga"                   ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO ??
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    ' ========================================================

    ' LIMPIAR
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ' PROTEGER
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub


' =========================================================
' BOT├ôN 2 (TConecta ? QÔÇôU)
' =========================================================
Private Sub CommandButton2_Click()

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' ?? FILA NUEVA REAL (SALTA SIEMPRE)
    Dim filaNueva As Long
    filaNueva = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max( _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row _
                ) + 1

    If filaNueva < 2 Then filaNueva = 2

    ' ?? TOMAR DIRECTO DE M7
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17).Value = ws.Range("M7").Value

    ' HORA
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")

    ' USUARIO

    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor

    ' TIPO
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21).Value = "TConecta D"

    ' ?? BORDES QÔÇôU
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17), ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21))
        .Borders(xlEdgeLeft).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeRight).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeTop).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlEdgeBottom).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders(xlInsideVertical).LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ========================================================
    ' ?? SISTEMA TIPO BANCO: TRASPASO DE BILLETES (RECARGA)
    ' ========================================================
    Dim wsDestino As Worksheet
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDestino = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If Not wsDestino Is Nothing Then
        If wsDestino.ProtectContents Then wsDestino.Unprotect Password:="12"
        
        proximaFila = wsDestino.Cells(wsDestino.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
        If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ws.Range("L12").Value       ' B: 1000
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ws.Range("K12").Value       ' C: 500
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ws.Range("J12").Value       ' D: 200
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ws.Range("I12").Value       ' E: 100
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ws.Range("H12").Value       ' F: 50
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ws.Range("G12").Value       ' G: 20
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ws.Range("J16").Value       ' H: 10
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ws.Range("I16").Value       ' I: 5
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ws.Range("H16").Value      ' J: 2
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ws.Range("G16").Value      ' K: 1
        
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName                   ' L: Usuario
        wsDestino.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Recarga"                   ' M: TIPO DE MOVIMIENTO ??
        
        wsDestino.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    End If
    ' ========================================================

    ' LIMPIAR
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ' PROTEGER
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    Unload Me

End Sub

' CIERRE CON X (NO HACE NADA)

    If CloseMode = 0 Then
        Confirmado = False
    End If

VBA MACRO UserForm4.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm4'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' Variables globales para controlar la memoria matem├ítica
Dim valorAcumulado As Double
Dim operacionPendiente As String
Dim nuevoNumero As Boolean

' --- HACER QUE ABRA LISTA PARA ESCRIBIR DE UNA VEZ ---
Private Sub UserForm_Activate()
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
    ' Selecciona el "0" para que al tocar cualquier tecla se borre solo
    txtPantalla.SelStart = 0
    txtPantalla.SelLength = Len(txtPantalla.Text)
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    txtPantalla.TextAlign = fmTextAlignRight ' Mantiene tus n├║meros a la derecha
    txtPantalla.Text = "0"
End Sub

' --- CONTROLADOR PARA BORRAR EL CERO INICIAL AL ESCRIBIR ---
Private Sub txtPantalla_Change()
    ' Si el texto empieza con "0" y escribes un n├║mero seguido, borra el "0"
    If Len(txtPantalla.Text) > 1 And Left(txtPantalla.Text, 1) = "0" Then
        Dim segundoCaracter As String
        segundoCaracter = Mid(txtPantalla.Text, 2, 1)
        ' Si lo que se escribi├│ es un n├║mero (del 0 al 9), eliminamos el cero de la izquierda
        If segundoCaracter >= "0" And segundoCaracter <= "9" Then
            txtPantalla.Text = Mid(txtPantalla.Text, 2)
        End If
    End If
End Sub

' --- CAPTURA DEL TECLADO A NIVEL FORMULARIO ---
Private Sub UserForm_KeyPress(ByVal KeyAscii As MSForms.ReturnInteger)
    Select Case KeyAscii
        Case 13 ' Tecla ENTER
            KeyAscii = 0 ' Cancela el Enter para proteger la lista lateral
            Call PresionarIgual
        Case 27 ' Tecla ESCAPE
            Call ReiniciarTodo
    End Select
End Sub

' --- CAPTURA DEL ENTER DENTRO DE LA PANTALLA ---
Private Sub txtPantalla_KeyPress(ByVal KeyAscii As MSForms.ReturnInteger)
    If KeyAscii = 13 Then
        KeyAscii = 0 ' Cancela el Enter aqu├¡ tambi├®n
        Call PresionarIgual
    End If
End Sub

' --- L├ôGICA DE ENTRADA (BOTONES GR├üFICOS) ---
Private Sub PresionarNumero(Num As String)
    If txtPantalla.Text = "0" Then
        txtPantalla.Text = Num
    Else
        txtPantalla.Text = txtPantalla.Text & Num
    End If
    txtPantalla.SetFocus ' Devuelve el foco a la pantalla
End Sub

Private Sub PresionarOperacion(Op As String)
    txtPantalla.Text = txtPantalla.Text & Op
    txtPantalla.SetFocus ' Devuelve el foco a la pantalla
End Sub

' --- EL CEREBRO: EVALUAR Y MANDAR AL HISTORIAL ---
Private Sub PresionarIgual()
    Dim formula As String
    Dim resultado As Variant
    
    formula = txtPantalla.Text
    
    If formula = "" Or formula = "0" Then Exit Sub
    
    ' Intentar resolver la operaci├│n escrita
    On Error Resume Next
    resultado = Application.Evaluate(formula)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    ' Si la operaci├│n est├í mal escrita muestra error
    If IsError(resultado) Or IsEmpty(resultado) Then
        MsgBox "Operaci├│n inv├ílida", vbCritical, "Error"
    Else
        ' Guarda el registro en la lista de la derecha (lstHistorial)
        lstHistorial.AddItem formula & " = " & resultado
        
        ' Auto-scroll hacia abajo
        If lstHistorial.ListCount > 0 Then
            lstHistorial.TopIndex = lstHistorial.ListCount - 1
        End If
        
        ' Muestra el resultado en la pantalla gris
        txtPantalla.Text = resultado
    End If
    
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
End Sub

' --- BOTONES DE LIMPIEZA ---
Private Sub ReiniciarTodo()
    txtPantalla.Text = "0"
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
End Sub

Private Sub btnC_Click()
    Call ReiniciarTodo
End Sub

Private Sub btnCE_Click()
    If Len(txtPantalla.Text) > 1 Then
        txtPantalla.Text = Left(txtPantalla.Text, Len(txtPantalla.Text) - 1)
    Else
        txtPantalla.Text = "0"
    End If
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
End Sub

Private Sub btnBorrarHistorial_Click()
    lstHistorial.Clear
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
End Sub

Private Sub btnPorcentaje_Click()
    txtPantalla.Text = txtPantalla.Text & "/100"
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
End Sub

' --- CONEXI├ôN DE BOTONES GR├üFICOS ---
Private Sub btn0_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("0"): End Sub
Private Sub btn1_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("1"): End Sub
Private Sub btn2_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("2"): End Sub
Private Sub btn3_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("3"): End Sub
Private Sub btn4_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("4"): End Sub
Private Sub btn5_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("5"): End Sub
Private Sub btn6_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("6"): End Sub
Private Sub btn7_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("7"): End Sub
Private Sub btn8_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("8"): End Sub
Private Sub btn9_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("9"): End Sub
Private Sub btnPunto_Click(): Call PresionarNumero("."): End Sub

Private Sub btnSuma_Click(): Call PresionarOperacion("+"): End Sub
Private Sub btnResta_Click(): Call PresionarOperacion("-"): End Sub
Private Sub btnMultiplicar_Click(): Call PresionarOperacion("*"): End Sub
Private Sub btnDividir_Click(): Call PresionarOperacion("/"): End Sub
Private Sub btnIgual_Click()
    Dim formula As String
    Dim resultado As Variant
    Dim posX As Double, posY As Double
    
    ' 1. Guardar las coordenadas EXACTAS antes del salto de Excel
    posX = Me.Left
    posY = Me.Top
    
    formula = txtPantalla.Text
    
    If formula = "" Or formula = "0" Then Exit Sub
    
    formula = Replace(formula, ",", ".")
    
    On Error Resume Next
    resultado = Application.Evaluate(formula)
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If IsError(resultado) Or IsEmpty(resultado) Then
        MsgBox "Operaci├│n inv├ílida", vbCritical, "Error"
    Else
        ' Guarda en el historial
        lstHistorial.AddItem formula & " = " & resultado
        
        ' Muestra el resultado
        txtPantalla.Text = resultado
        
        ' Auto-scroll hacia abajo
        If lstHistorial.ListCount > 0 Then
            lstHistorial.TopIndex = lstHistorial.ListCount - 1
        End If
    End If
    
    ' 2. Regresar el cursor a la pantalla
    txtPantalla.SetFocus
    
    ' 3. FORZAR a la calculadora a quedarse en su sitio original
    Me.Left = posX
    Me.Top = posY
End Sub

    ' Llama al formulario por su nombre real
    UserForm4.Show
End Sub
