VBA MACRO UserForm5.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm5'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ========================================================================
' ?? 1. BOT├ôN: CERRAR EL REPORTE DE INVENTARIO
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnCerrar_Click()
    Unload Me
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 2. ARRANQUE INICIAL: PROCESA E INYECTA LOS SALDOS EN LA PANTALLA
' ========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    Dim wsBilletes As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim tipoMov As String
    Dim granTotalDinero As Double
    
    ' Variables locales de inventario para la pantalla
    Dim t1000 As Long, t500 As Long, t200 As Long, t100 As Long, t50 As Long, t20 As Long
    Dim t10 As Long, t5 As Long, t2 As Long, t1 As Long
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsBilletes = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsBilletes Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Error: No se encuentra la hoja llamada 'billetes'.", vbCritical, "Hoja no encontrada"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    lastRow = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' Cargar Fila 2 (Inventario Inicial)
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        t1000 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 2).Value): t500 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 3).Value)
        t200 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 4).Value): t100 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 5).Value)
        t50 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 6).Value): t20 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 7).Value)
        t10 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 8).Value): t5 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 9).Value)
        t2 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 10).Value): t1 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 11).Value)
    End If
    
    ' Procesar Flujo del d├¡a convirtiendo a min├║sculas limpias
    If lastRow >= 3 Then
        For i = 3 To lastRow
            tipoMov = LCase(Trim(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 13).Value))
            
            If tipoMov = "deposito" Or tipoMov = "recarga" Or tipoMov = "cambio" Or tipoMov = "entrada" Or tipoMov = "registro" Then
                t1000 = t1000 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): t500 = t500 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                t200 = t200 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): t100 = t100 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                t50 = t50 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): t20 = t20 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                t10 = t10 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): t5 = t5 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                t2 = t2 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): t1 = t1 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
                
            ElseIf tipoMov = "retiro" Then
                t1000 = t1000 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): t500 = t500 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                t200 = t200 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): t100 = t100 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                t50 = t50 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): t20 = t20 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                t10 = t10 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): t5 = t5 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                t2 = t2 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): t1 = t1 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
            End If
        Next i
    End If
    
    granTotalDinero = (t1000 * 1000) + (t500 * 500) + (t200 * 200) + (t100 * 100) + (t50 * 50) + (t20 * 20) + (t10 * 10) + (t5 * 5) + (t2 * 2) + (t1 * 1)
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Me.Controls("lbl1000").Caption = t1000 & " pzas": Me.Controls("lbl500").Caption = t500 & " pzas"
    Me.Controls("lbl200").Caption = t200 & " pzas": Me.Controls("lbl100").Caption = t100 & " pzas"
    Me.Controls("lbl50").Caption = t50 & " pzas": Me.Controls("lbl20").Caption = t20 & " pzas"
    Me.Controls("lbl10").Caption = t10 & " pzas": Me.Controls("lbl5").Caption = t5 & " pzas"
    Me.Controls("lbl2").Caption = t2 & " pzas": Me.Controls("lbl1").Caption = t1 & " pzas"
    Me.Label111.Caption = "Debe de haber en la caja: " & FormatCurrency(granTotalDinero, 2)
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 3. BOT├ôN: GUARDAR Y PROCESAR CONVERSI├ôN CON CANDADO DIRECTO EN VIVO
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnGuardar_Click()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Dim wsBilletes As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim tipoMov As String
    
    ' ?? Inventario Actual Real Calculado en Caliente
    Dim act1000 As Long, act500 As Long, act200 As Long, act100 As Long, act50 As Long, act20 As Long
    Dim act10 As Long, act5 As Long, act2 As Long, act1 As Long
    
    ' Variables de captura
    Dim ing1000 As Long, ing500 As Long, ing200 As Long, ing100 As Long, ing50 As Long, ing20 As Long
    Dim ing10 As Long, ing5 As Long, ing2 As Long, ing1 As Long
    Dim egr1000 As Long, egr500 As Long, egr200 As Long, egr100 As Long, egr50 As Long, egr20 As Long
    Dim egr10 As Long, egr5 As Long, egr2 As Long, egr1 As Long
    
    Dim valorIngreso As Double, valorEgreso As Double
    
    Set wsBilletes = Sheets("billetes")
    lastRow = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' --- ESCANEO DE BIT├üCORA EN CALIENTE ---
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        act1000 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 2).Value): act500 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 3).Value)
        act200 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 4).Value): act100 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 5).Value)
        act50 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 6).Value): act20 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 7).Value)
        act10 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 8).Value): act5 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 9).Value)
        act2 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 10).Value): act1 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 11).Value)
    End If
    If lastRow >= 3 Then
        For i = 3 To lastRow
            tipoMov = LCase(Trim(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 13).Value))
            If tipoMov = "deposito" Or tipoMov = "recarga" Or tipoMov = "cambio" Or tipoMov = "entrada" Or tipoMov = "registro" Then
                act1000 = act1000 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): act500 = act500 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                act200 = act200 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): act100 = act100 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                act50 = act50 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): act20 = act20 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                act10 = act10 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): act5 = act5 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                act2 = act2 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): act1 = act1 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
            ElseIf tipoMov = "retiro" Then
                act1000 = act1000 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): act500 = act500 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                act200 = act200 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): act100 = act100 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                act50 = act50 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): act20 = act20 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                act10 = act10 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): act5 = act5 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                act2 = act2 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): act1 = act1 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
            End If
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' --- LEER CAPTURA ---
    ing1000 = Val(txtIng1000.Value): ing500 = Val(txtIng500.Value): ing200 = Val(txtIng200.Value): ing100 = Val(txtIng100.Value): ing50 = Val(txtIng50.Value): ing20 = Val(txtIng20.Value): ing10 = Val(txtIng10.Value): ing5 = Val(txtIng5.Value): ing2 = Val(txtIng2.Value): ing1 = Val(txtIng1.Value)
    egr1000 = Val(txtEgr1000.Value): egr500 = Val(txtEgr500.Value): egr200 = Val(txtEgr200.Value): egr100 = Val(txtEgr100.Value): egr50 = Val(txtEgr50.Value): egr20 = Val(txtEgr20.Value): egr10 = Val(txtEgr10.Value): egr5 = Val(txtEgr5.Value): egr2 = Val(txtEgr2.Value): egr1 = Val(txtEgr1.Value)
    
    ' ?? CANDADO A: PROHIBIR SIGNOS NEGATIVOS TEXTUALES INYECTADOS A MANO
    If ing1000 < 0 Or ing500 < 0 Or ing200 < 0 Or ing100 < 0 Or ing50 < 0 Or ing20 < 0 Or ing10 < 0 Or ing5 < 0 Or ing2 < 0 Or ing1 < 0 Or _
       egr1000 < 0 Or egr500 < 0 Or egr200 < 0 Or egr100 < 0 Or egr50 < 0 Or egr20 < 0 Or egr10 < 0 Or egr5 < 0 Or egr2 < 0 Or egr1 < 0 Then
        MsgBox "┬íOperaci├│n Denegada! No se permite ingresar n├║meros negativos en los cuadros de captura.", vbCritical, "Error de Entrada"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' ?? CANDADO B: CONTROL DE BALANCE CON DOBLE CAPA (BLINDAJE TOTAL ANTI-NEGATIVOS)
    ' Si el usuario pide retirar piezas (Egr > 0), bloquea si la caja ya est├í vac├¡a (Act <= 0)
    ' o si la cantidad solicitada supera el inventario f├¡sico disponible (Egr > Act).
    ' ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    If egr1000 > 0 Then: If act1000 <= 0 Or egr1000 > act1000 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 1000 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr500 > 0 Then: If act500 <= 0 Or egr500 > act500 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 500 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr200 > 0 Then: If act200 <= 0 Or egr200 > act200 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 200 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr100 > 0 Then: If act100 <= 0 Or egr100 > act100 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 100 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr50 > 0 Then: If act50 <= 0 Or egr50 > act50 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 50 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr20 > 0 Then: If act20 <= 0 Or egr20 > act20 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 20 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr10 > 0 Then: If act10 <= 0 Or egr10 > act10 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 10 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr5 > 0 Then: If act5 <= 0 Or egr5 > act5 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 5 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr2 > 0 Then: If act2 <= 0 Or egr2 > act2 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 2 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If egr1 > 0 Then: If act1 <= 0 Or egr1 > act1 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 1 para realizar la conversi├│n.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub

    ' ?? CANDADO C: CUADRE MONETARIO PERFECTO
    valorIngreso = (ing1000 * 1000) + (ing500 * 500) + (ing200 * 200) + (ing100 * 100) + (ing50 * 50) + (ing20 * 20) + (ing10 * 10) + (ing5 * 5) + (ing2 * 2) + (ing1 * 1)
    valorEgreso = (egr1000 * 1000) + (egr500 * 500) + (egr200 * 200) + (egr100 * 100) + (egr50 * 50) + (egr20 * 20) + (egr10 * 10) + (egr5 * 5) + (egr2 * 2) + (egr1 * 1)
                  
    If valorIngreso = 0 And valorEgreso = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No has ingresado ning├║n movimiento en la tabla de conversi├│n.", vbExclamation, "Campos Vac├¡os"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    If valorIngreso <> valorEgreso Then
        MsgBox "┬íLa conversi├│n no cuadra!" & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "Monto ingresado: " & FormatCurrency(valorIngreso, 2) & vbCrLf & _
               "Monto egresado: " & FormatCurrency(valorEgreso, 2) & vbCrLf & vbCrLf & _
               "El valor de las piezas que entran debe ser id├®ntico al que sale.", vbExclamation, "Error de Cuadre"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' ?? AUTORIZACI├ôN POR C├ôDIGO
    Dim userCode As String, userName As String
    userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo para autorizar la conversi├│n de piezas:", "Autorizaci├│n de Turno")
    Select Case Trim(userCode)
        Case "20": userName = "Ingrid"
        Case "64": userName = "Leticia"
        Case "02": userName = "Miguel"
        Case "86": userName = "Dita"
        Case "26": userName = "Yoyis"
        Case "15": userName = "Mabeli"
        Case Else
            MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido o proceso cancelado.", vbExclamation, "Operaci├│n Cancelada"
            Exit Sub
    End Select
    
    ' ?? REGISTRO HIST├ôRICO EN LA HOJA
    If wsBilletes.ProtectContents Then wsBilletes.Unprotect Password:="12"
    proximaFila = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = ing1000 - egr1000
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = ing500 - egr500
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = ing200 - egr200
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = ing100 - egr100
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = ing50 - egr50
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = ing20 - egr20
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = ing10 - egr10
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = ing5 - egr5
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = ing2 - egr2
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = ing1 - egr1
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "cambio"
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 14).Value = "Conversi├│n interna de piezas"
    
    wsBilletes.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' ?? LIMPIEZA AUTOM├üTICA Y RECARGA
    Call UserForm_Initialize
    txtIng1000.Value = "": txtIng500.Value = "": txtIng200.Value = "": txtIng100.Value = ""
    txtIng50.Value = "": txtIng20.Value = "": txtIng10.Value = "": txtIng5.Value = ""
    txtIng2.Value = "": txtIng1.Value = ""
    txtEgr1000.Value = "": txtEgr500.Value = "": txtEgr200.Value = "": txtEgr100.Value = ""
    txtEgr50.Value = "": txtEgr20.Value = "": txtEgr10.Value = "": txtEgr5.Value = ""
    txtEgr2.Value = "": txtEgr1.Value = ""
    
    MsgBox "Conversi├│n interna registrada con ├®xito por " & userName & ".", vbInformation, "Proceso Completado"
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Ocurri├│ un error al procesar el cambio: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "Error del Sistema"
End Sub

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO Module2.bas 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/Module2'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Sub AbrirReporteArqueo()
    ' Llama al formulario del reporte tipo banco
    UserForm5.Show
End Sub

Private Sub CommandButton4_Click() ' ?? Aseg├║rate de que este nombre coincida con tu bot├│n en UserForm6

    Confirmado = True

    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Set ws = Sheets("contador")

    ' Leer los datos de identidad guardados en el Tag del formulario
    Dim datos As Variant
    datos = Split(Me.Tag, "|")

    Dim userName As String
    userName = datos(1)

    Dim bgColor As Long
    bgColor = CLng(datos(2))

    ' FILA NUEVA EN LAS COLUMNAS QÔÇôU (Historial BBVA)
    Dim filaNueva As Long
    filaNueva = Application.WorksheetFunction.Max( _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 17).End(xlUp).Row, _
                    ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 18).End(xlUp).Row _
                ) + 1

    If filaNueva < 2 Then filaNueva = 2

    ' PASAR EL VALOR DE M8 A LA COLUMNA Q (17)
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17).Value = ws.Range("M8").Value
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 19).Value = Format(Now, "hh:mm AM/PM")
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Value = userName
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 20).Interior.Color = bgColor
    ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21).Value = "BN"

    ' DIBUJAR BORDES FINOS EN EL NUEVO REGISTRO
    With ws.Range(ws.Cells(filaNueva, 17), ws.Cells(filaNueva, 21))
        .Borders.LineStyle = xlContinuous
        .Borders.Color = RGB(0, 0, 0)
        .Borders.Weight = xlThin
    End With

    ' ?? LIMPIAR PANTALLA DIRECTAMENTE (Celdas de captura y calculadora de billetes)
    ws.Range("M7:M9, G12:L12, G16:J16").ClearContents

    ' Volver a proteger la hoja con el candado de macros activo
    ws.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    ' Cierra el formulario
    Unload Me

End Sub



Private Sub UserForm_Click()

End Sub

VBA MACRO UserForm7.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm7'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ========================================================================
' ?? 1. MOTOR DE C├ôMPUTO EN TIEMPO REAL CON S├ÜPER ALERTA VISUAL DESTACADA
' ========================================================================
Private Sub CalcularDiferenciaEnVivo()
    Dim vIngreso As Double, vEgreso As Double, vDiferencia As Double
    
    ' Asegurar que la etiqueta pueda mostrar colores de fondo
    lblDiferencia.BackStyle = fmBackStyleOpaque
    
    ' Sumar el valor monetario de lo que va entrando (Secuencia txtEntra)
    vIngreso = (Val(txtEntra1000.Value) * 1000) + (Val(txtEntra500.Value) * 500) + _
               (Val(txtEntra200.Value) * 200) + (Val(txtEntra100.Value) * 100) + _
               (Val(txtEntra50.Value) * 50) + (Val(txtEntra20.Value) * 20) + _
               (Val(txtEntra10.Value) * 10) + (Val(txtEntra5.Value) * 5) + _
               (Val(txtEntra2.Value) * 2) + (Val(txtEntra1.Value) * 1)
               
    ' Sumar el valor monetario de lo que va saliendo (Secuencia txtSale)
    vEgreso = (Val(txtSale1000.Value) * 1000) + (Val(txtSale500.Value) * 500) + _
              (Val(txtSale200.Value) * 200) + (Val(txtSale100.Value) * 100) + _
              (Val(txtSale50.Value) * 50) + (Val(txtSale20.Value) * 20) + _
              (Val(txtSale10.Value) * 10) + (Val(txtSale5.Value) * 5) + _
              (Val(txtSale2.Value) * 2) + (Val(txtSale1.Value) * 1)
              
    ' Calcular la diferencia neta
    vDiferencia = vIngreso - vEgreso
    
    ' Inyectar el resultado formateado en tu etiqueta lblDiferencia
    lblDiferencia.Caption = "  Diferencia: " & FormatCurrency(vDiferencia, 2) & "  "
    
    ' ?? DISE├æO ELECTR├ôNICO DIN├üMICO RESALTADO
    If vDiferencia > 0 Then
        ' Sobra dinero: Fondo Verde Claro, texto verde obscuro, tama├▒o normal
        lblDiferencia.BackColor = RGB(220, 255, 220)
        lblDiferencia.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 0)
        lblDiferencia.Font.Name = "Tahoma"
        lblDiferencia.Font.Size = 10
        lblDiferencia.Font.Bold = False
        
    ElseIf vDiferencia < 0 Then
        ' Falta dinero: Fondo Rojo Claro, texto rojo obscuro, tama├▒o normal
        lblDiferencia.BackColor = RGB(255, 220, 220)
        lblDiferencia.ForeColor = RGB(150, 0, 0)
        lblDiferencia.Font.Name = "Tahoma"
        lblDiferencia.Font.Size = 10
        lblDiferencia.Font.Bold = False
        
    Else ' vDiferencia = 0
        ' ?? EL S├ÜPER CUADRO DESTACADO CUANDO YA CUADR├ô PERFECTO
        If vIngreso > 0 Or vEgreso > 0 Then
            lblDiferencia.BackColor = RGB(0, 150, 0)       ' Cuadro Verde S├│lido Vivo
            lblDiferencia.ForeColor = RGB(255, 255, 255)   ' Letra Blanca de Alto Contraste
            lblDiferencia.Font.Name = "Segoe UI"           ' Tipograf├¡a moderna de sistema
            lblDiferencia.Font.Size = 12                   ' Letra m├ís grande destacada
            lblDiferencia.Font.Bold = True                 ' Negrita Absoluta
        Else
            ' Estado inicial neutro cuando el cuadro abre vac├¡o
            lblDiferencia.BackStyle = fmBackStyleTransparent
            lblDiferencia.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0)
            lblDiferencia.Font.Name = "Tahoma"
            lblDiferencia.Font.Size = 10
            lblDiferencia.Font.Bold = False
        End If
    End If
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 2. ARRANQUE INICIAL: RESETEA Y LIMPIA TODA LA INTERFAZ
' ========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    On Error Resume Next
    txtEntra1000.Value = "": txtEntra500.Value = "": txtEntra200.Value = "": txtEntra100.Value = ""
    txtEntra50.Value = "": txtEntra20.Value = "": txtEntra10.Value = "": txtEntra5.Value = ""
    txtEntra2.Value = "": txtEntra1.Value = ""
    
    txtSale1000.Value = "": txtSale500.Value = "": txtSale200.Value = "": txtSale100.Value = ""
    txtSale50.Value = "": txtSale20.Value = "": txtSale10.Value = "": txtSale5.Value = ""
    txtSale2.Value = "": txtSale1.Value = ""
    
    Call CalcularDiferenciaEnVivo
    On Error GoTo 0
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 3. BOT├ôN: GUARDAR Y PROCESAR CONVERSI├ôN CON CANDADOS INQUEBRANTABLES
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnProcesarCambio_Click()
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    Dim wsBilletes As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long, i As Long
    Dim proximaFila As Long
    Dim tipoMov As String
    Dim userCode As String, userName As String
    
    ' Inventario Actual Real Calculado en Caliente desde el Historial
    Dim act1000 As Long, act500 As Long, act200 As Long, act100 As Long, act50 As Long, act20 As Long
    Dim act10 As Long, act5 As Long, act2 As Long, act1 As Long
    
    ' Variables de captura
    Dim entra1000 As Long, entra500 As Long, entra200 As Long, entra100 As Long, entra50 As Long, entra20 As Long
    Dim entra10 As Long, entra5 As Long, entra2 As Long, entra1 As Long
    Dim sale1000 As Long, sale500 As Long, sale200 As Long, sale100 As Long, sale50 As Long, sale20 As Long
    Dim sale10 As Long, sale5 As Long, sale2 As Long, sale1 As Long
    
    Dim valorIngreso As Double, valorEgreso As Double
    
    Set wsBilletes = Sheets("billetes")
    lastRow = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' --- ESCANEO DE BIT├üCORA CONTABLE EN TIEMPO REAL ---
    If lastRow >= 2 Then
        act1000 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 2).Value): act500 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 3).Value)
        act200 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 4).Value): act100 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 5).Value)
        act50 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 6).Value): act20 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 7).Value)
        act10 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 8).Value): act5 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 9).Value)
        act2 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 10).Value): act1 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 11).Value)
    End If
    If lastRow >= 3 Then
        For i = 3 To lastRow
            tipoMov = LCase(Trim(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 13).Value))
            If tipoMov = "deposito" Or tipoMov = "recarga" Or tipoMov = "cambio" Or tipoMov = "entrada" Or tipoMov = "registro" Then
                act1000 = act1000 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): act500 = act500 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                act200 = act200 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): act100 = act100 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                act50 = act50 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): act20 = act20 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                act10 = act10 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): act5 = act5 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                act2 = act2 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): act1 = act1 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
            ElseIf tipoMov = "retiro" Then
                act1000 = act1000 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 2).Value): act500 = act500 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                act200 = act200 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 4).Value): act100 = act100 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 5).Value)
                act50 = act50 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 6).Value): act20 = act20 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 7).Value)
                act10 = act10 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 8).Value): act5 = act5 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 9).Value)
                act2 = act2 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 10).Value): act1 = act1 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(i, 11).Value)
            End If
        Next i
    End If
    
    ' --- LEER CAPTURA ---
    entra1000 = Val(txtEntra1000.Value): entra500 = Val(txtEntra500.Value): entra200 = Val(txtEntra200.Value): entra100 = Val(txtEntra100.Value): entra50 = Val(txtEntra50.Value): entra20 = Val(txtEntra20.Value): entra10 = Val(txtEntra10.Value): entra5 = Val(txtEntra5.Value): entra2 = Val(txtEntra2.Value): entra1 = Val(txtEntra1.Value)
    sale1000 = Val(txtSale1000.Value): sale500 = Val(txtSale500.Value): sale200 = Val(txtSale200.Value): sale100 = Val(txtSale100.Value): sale50 = Val(txtSale50.Value): sale20 = Val(txtSale20.Value): sale10 = Val(txtSale10.Value): sale5 = Val(txtSale5.Value): sale2 = Val(txtSale2.Value): sale1 = Val(txtSale1.Value)
    
    ' ?? CANDADO A: PROHIBIR SIGNOS NEGATIVOS TEXTUALES
    If entra1000 < 0 Or entra500 < 0 Or entra200 < 0 Or entra100 < 0 Or entra50 < 0 Or entra20 < 0 Or entra10 < 0 Or entra5 < 0 Or entra2 < 0 Or entra1 < 0 Or _
       sale1000 < 0 Or sale500 < 0 Or sale200 < 0 Or sale100 < 0 Or sale50 < 0 Or sale20 < 0 Or sale10 < 0 Or sale5 < 0 Or sale2 < 0 Or sale1 < 0 Then
        MsgBox "┬íOperaci├│n Denegada! No se permite ingresar n├║meros negativos en los cuadros de captura.", vbCritical, "Error de Entrada"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    ' ?? CANDADO B: CONTROL DE BALANCE MULTIL├ìNEA ESTRICTO EN EGRESOS
    ' ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    If sale1000 > 0 Then: If act1000 <= 0 Or sale1000 > act1000 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 1000.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale500 > 0 Then: If act500 <= 0 Or sale500 > act500 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 500.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale200 > 0 Then: If act200 <= 0 Or sale200 > act200 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 200.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale100 > 0 Then: If act100 <= 0 Or sale100 > act100 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 100.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale50 > 0 Then: If act50 <= 0 Or sale50 > act50 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 50.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale20 > 0 Then: If act20 <= 0 Or sale20 > act20 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de billetes de 20.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale10 > 0 Then: If act10 <= 0 Or sale10 > act10 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 10.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale5 > 0 Then: If act5 <= 0 Or sale5 > act5 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 5.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale2 > 0 Then: If act2 <= 0 Or sale2 > act2 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 2.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub
    If sale1 > 0 Then: If act1 <= 0 Or sale1 > act1 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el cambio porque no cuentas con saldo suficiente de monedas de 1.", vbCritical, "Falta Stock": Exit Sub

    ' ?? CANDADO C: CUADRE MONETARIO PERFECTO
    valorIngreso = (entra1000 * 1000) + (entra500 * 500) + (entra200 * 200) + (entra100 * 100) + (entra50 * 50) + (entra20 * 20) + (entra10 * 10) + (entra5 * 5) + (entra2 * 2) + (entra1 * 1)
    valorEgreso = (sale1000 * 1000) + (sale500 * 500) + (sale200 * 200) + (sale100 * 100) + (sale50 * 50) + (sale20 * 20) + (sale10 * 10) + (sale5 * 5) + (sale2 * 2) + (sale1 * 1)
                  
    If valorIngreso = 0 And valorEgreso = 0 Then
        MsgBox "No has ingresado ning├║n movimiento en la tabla de conversi├│n.", vbExclamation, "Campos Vac├¡os"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    If valorIngreso <> valorEgreso Then
        MsgBox "┬íLa conversi├│n no cuadra! El valor neto debe ser $0.00 para poder procesar.", vbExclamation, "Error de Cuadre"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' ?? AUTORIZACI├ôN POR C├ôDIGO
    userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo para autorizar la conversi├│n:", "Autorizaci├│n")
    Select Case Trim(userCode)
        Case "20": userName = "Ingrid"
        Case "64": userName = "Leticia"
        Case "02": userName = "Miguel"
        Case "86": userName = "Dita"
        Case "26": userName = "Yoyis"
        Case "15": userName = "Mabeli"
        Case Else: MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido o proceso cancelado.", vbExclamation: Exit Sub
    End Select
    
    ' ?? REGISTRO HIST├ôRICO
    If wsBilletes.ProtectContents Then wsBilletes.Unprotect Password:="12"
    proximaFila = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = entra1000 - sale1000
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = entra500 - sale500
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = entra200 - sale200
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = entra100 - sale100
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = entra50 - sale50
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = entra20 - sale20
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = entra10 - sale10
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = entra5 - sale5
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = entra2 - sale2
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = entra1 - sale1
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "cambio"
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 14).Value = "Conversi├│n interna de piezas"
    
    wsBilletes.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    ' Reiniciar el formulario de forma segura
    Call UserForm_Initialize
    MsgBox "Conversi├│n interna registrada con ├®xito por " & userName & ".", vbInformation, "Proceso Completado"
    Exit Sub
ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "Error Cr├¡tico: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "Error del Sistema"
End Sub

VBA MACRO UserForm8.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm8'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Dim Actualizando As Boolean ' REGLA DE ORO: Esta l├¡nea DEBE ir al principio de todo

' ========================================================================
' 1. BOT├ôN: CERRAR EL FORMULARIO DE RETIRO
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnCerrar_Click()
    ' Cierra el formulario y limpia la memoria
    Unload Me
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' 2. FUNCI├ôN PRINCIPAL: CALCULA EL TOTAL EN PESOS EN TIEMPO REAL
' ========================================================================
Private Sub CalcularTotal()
    If Actualizando Then Exit Sub
    
    Dim total As Double
    total = (Val(txtR1000.Text) * 1000) + (Val(txtR500.Text) * 500) + _
            (Val(txtR200.Text) * 200) + (Val(txtR100.Text) * 100) + _
            (Val(txtR50.Text) * 50) + (Val(txtR20.Text) * 20) + _
            (Val(txtR10.Text) * 10) + (Val(txtR5.Text) * 5) + _
            (Val(txtR2.Text) * 2) + (Val(txtR1.Text) * 1)
            
    Me.lblTotalRetiro.Caption = FormatCurrency(total, 2)
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' 3. EVENTOS DETECTORES DE ESCRITURA (AL CAMBIAR N├ÜMEROS)
' ========================================================================
Private Sub txtR1000_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR500_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR200_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR100_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR50_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR20_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR10_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR5_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR2_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub
Private Sub txtR1_Change(): CalcularTotal: End Sub

' ========================================================================
' 4. ARRANQUE DEL FORMULARIO (CARGA LOS MOTIVOS)
' ========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    Me.lblTotalRetiro.Caption = "$0.00"
    
    ' Cargar la lista desplegable con los motivos comunes
    With Me.cmbMotivo
        .Clear
        .AddItem "Pago a Proveedor"
        .AddItem "Tortilla"
        .AddItem "Recurso para otro sobre"
        .AddItem "Retiro para pago de vales"
        .AddItem "Otro (Especificar abajo)"
    End With
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' 5. BOT├ôN: PROCESAR RETIRO Y GUARDAR EN BIT├üCORA CON CANDADO DE INVENTARIO
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnProcesarRetiro_Click()
    Dim totalRetiro As Double
    
    totalRetiro = (Val(txtR1000.Text) * 1000) + (Val(txtR500.Text) * 500) + _
                  (Val(txtR200.Text) * 200) + (Val(txtR100.Text) * 100) + _
                  (Val(txtR50.Text) * 50) + (Val(txtR20.Text) * 20) + _
                  (Val(txtR10.Text) * 10) + (Val(txtR5.Text) * 5) + _
                  (Val(txtR2.Text) * 2) + (Val(txtR1.Text) * 1)

    ' Validaci├│n 1: Que no vaya en ceros
    If totalRetiro = 0 Then
        MsgBox "Debes ingresar las piezas de billetes que vas a retirar.", vbExclamation, "Sin datos"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' Validaci├│n 2: Obligar a seleccionar un motivo de la lista
    If Me.cmbMotivo.ListIndex = -1 Then
        MsgBox "Por favor, selecciona el motivo del retiro de efectivo.", vbCritical, "Falta Motivo"
        Exit Sub
    End If

    ' =======================================================================
    ' ?? MOTOR DE INVENTARIO EN TIEMPO REAL CONTRA SALDOS HIST├ôRICOS
    ' =======================================================================
    Dim inv1000 As Long, inv500 As Long, inv200 As Long, inv100 As Long, inv50 As Long
    Dim inv20 As Long, inv10 As Long, inv5 As Long, inv2 As Long, inv1 As Long
    Dim wsBilletes As Worksheet
    Dim lastRB As Long, rB As Long
    Dim tMov As String
    
    Set wsBilletes = Sheets("billetes")
    lastRB = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' Inicializar sumatoria con el Inventario Inicial (Fila 2)
    If lastRB >= 2 Then
        inv1000 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 2).Value): inv500 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 3).Value)
        inv200 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 4).Value): inv100 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 5).Value)
        inv50 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 6).Value): inv20 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 7).Value)
        inv10 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 8).Value): inv5 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 9).Value)
        inv2 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 10).Value): inv1 = Val(wsBilletes.Cells(2, 11).Value)
    End If
    
    ' Procesar el flujo acumulado del d├¡a
    If lastRB >= 3 Then
        For rB = 3 To lastRB
            tMov = LCase(Trim(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 13).Value))
            If tMov = "entrada" Or tMov = "registro" Or tMov = "cambio" Or tMov = "deposito" Or tMov = "recarga" Then
                inv1000 = inv1000 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 2).Value): inv500 = inv500 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 3).Value)
                inv200 = inv200 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 4).Value): inv100 = inv100 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 5).Value)
                inv50 = inv50 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 6).Value): inv20 = inv20 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 7).Value)
                inv10 = inv10 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 8).Value): inv5 = inv5 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 9).Value)
                inv2 = inv2 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 10).Value): inv1 = inv1 + Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 11).Value)
            ElseIf tMov = "retiro" Then
                inv1000 = inv1000 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 2).Value): inv500 = inv500 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 3).Value)
                inv200 = inv200 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 4).Value): inv100 = inv100 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 5).Value)
                inv50 = inv50 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 6).Value): inv20 = inv20 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 7).Value)
                inv10 = inv10 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 8).Value): inv5 = inv5 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 9).Value)
                inv2 = inv2 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 10).Value): inv1 = inv1 - Val(wsBilletes.Cells(rB, 11).Value)
            End If
        Next rB
    End If

    ' ?? CANDADO DE CONTROL VERTICAL ESTRICTO (ANTI-NEGATIVOS)
    ' Valida una a una las denominaciones de forma lineal y directa
    If Val(txtR1000.Text) > 0 Then: If inv1000 <= 0 Or Val(txtR1000.Text) > inv1000 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 1000 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR500.Text) > 0 Then: If inv500 <= 0 Or Val(txtR500.Text) > inv500 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 500 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR200.Text) > 0 Then: If inv200 <= 0 Or Val(txtR200.Text) > inv200 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 200 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR100.Text) > 0 Then: If inv100 <= 0 Or Val(txtR100.Text) > inv100 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 100 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR50.Text) > 0 Then: If inv50 <= 0 Or Val(txtR50.Text) > inv50 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 50 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR20.Text) > 0 Then: If inv20 <= 0 Or Val(txtR20.Text) > inv20 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con billetes de 20 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR10.Text) > 0 Then: If inv10 <= 0 Or Val(txtR10.Text) > inv10 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con monedas de 10 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR5.Text) > 0 Then: If inv5 <= 0 Or Val(txtR5.Text) > inv5 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con monedas de 5 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR2.Text) > 0 Then: If inv2 <= 0 Or Val(txtR2.Text) > inv2 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con monedas de 2 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub
    If Val(txtR1.Text) > 0 Then: If inv1 <= 0 Or Val(txtR1.Text) > inv1 Then MsgBox "No se puede realizar el retiro porque no cuentas con monedas de 1 suficientes en caja.", vbCritical, "Falta Inventario F├¡sico": Exit Sub

    ' Petici├│n de Seguridad: C├│digo de Usuario
    Dim userCode As String, userName As String
    userCode = InputBox("Ingrese su c├│digo para autorizar el RETIRO:", "Seguridad")
    
    Select Case Trim(userCode)
        Case "20": userName = "Ingrid"
        Case "64": userName = "Leticia"
        Case "02": userName = "Miguel"
        Case "86": userName = "Dita"
        Case "26": userName = "Yoyis"
        Case "15": userName = "Mabeli"
        Case "": Exit Sub
        Case Else
            MsgBox "C├│digo inv├ílido", vbCritical: Exit Sub
    End Select

    ' ?? REGISTRO HIST├ôRICO EN LA HOJA DE BILLETES
    If wsBilletes.ProtectContents Then wsBilletes.Unprotect Password:="12"

    Dim proximaFila As Long
    proximaFila = wsBilletes.Cells(wsBilletes.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    If proximaFila < 2 Then proximaFila = 2

    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).Value = Now
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 1).NumberFormat = "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss"
    
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 2).Value = Val(txtR1000.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 3).Value = Val(txtR500.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 4).Value = Val(txtR200.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 5).Value = Val(txtR100.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 6).Value = Val(txtR50.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 7).Value = Val(txtR20.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 8).Value = Val(txtR10.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 9).Value = Val(txtR5.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 10).Value = Val(txtR2.Text)
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 11).Value = Val(txtR1.Text)
    
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 12).Value = userName
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 13).Value = "Retiro"
    wsBilletes.Cells(proximaFila, 14).Value = Me.cmbMotivo.Text & " - " & Me.txtDetalle.Text

    wsBilletes.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True

    ' ?? ACUMULAR MONETARIAMENTE EN LA HOJA CONTADOR (CELDA M3)
    Dim wsContador As Worksheet
    Set wsContador = Sheets("contador")
    
    If wsContador.ProtectContents Then wsContador.Unprotect Password:="12"
    
    wsContador.Range("M3").Value = Val(wsContador.Range("M3").Value) + totalRetiro
    
    ' Re-proteger la pantalla principal blindando M3 junto con M5 y M6
    wsContador.Cells.Locked = True
    wsContador.Range("M4, M7:M9, N8, N5:N6, G12:L12, G16:J16, I5:I6").Locked = False
    wsContador.Range("M3, M5:M6").Locked = True
    wsContador.Protect Password:="12", UserInterfaceOnly:=True
    
    wsContador.Activate
    
    MsgBox "Retiro por " & FormatCurrency(totalRetiro, 2) & " registrado con ├®xito.", vbInformation, "├ëxito"
    Unload Me
End Sub

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO UserForm9.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm9'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ========================================================================
' ?? 1. BOT├ôN: CERRAR EL HISTORIAL
' ========================================================================
Private Sub btnCerrar_Click()
    ' Cierra la ventana de la bit├ícora y libera memoria
    Unload Me
End Sub

' ========================================================================
' ?? 2. ARRANQUE INICIAL: VISOR UNIFICADO DE MOVIMIENTOS Y ARQUEOS
' ========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    Dim ws As Worksheet
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim monto As Double
    Dim fecha As String
    Dim usuario As String
    Dim tipoMov As String
    Dim motivo As String
    Dim detalles As String
    Dim nota As String
    
    ' Conectar de forma segura con la hoja de registros
    On Error Resume Next
    Set ws = Sheets("billetes")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If ws Is Nothing Then
        MsgBox "Error: No se encuentra la hoja llamada 'billetes'.", vbCritical, "Hoja Faltante"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Encontrar la ├║ltima fila con datos en la bit├ícora
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' Configurar las 4 columnas del ListBox original de forma limpia
    With Me.lstRetiros
        .Clear
        .ColumnCount = 4
        ' Definir anchos para cada columna (Fecha, Cajero, Monto, Notas)
        .ColumnWidths = "110 pt; 70 pt; 70 pt; 250 pt"
    End With
    
    ' Recorrer la hoja "al rev├®s" para ver lo m├ís nuevo hasta arriba
    For i = lastRow To 2 Step -1
        
        tipoMov = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 13).Value)
        motivo = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 14).Value)
        detalles = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 15).Value)
        
        ' ?? EL FILTRO INTELIGENTE:
        ' Pasa directo si es "registro" O si es "Retiro"/"Entrada" con texto en la Columna N
        If tipoMov = "registro" Or ((tipoMov = "Retiro" Or tipoMov = "Entrada") And motivo <> "") Then
            
            ' Extraer los textos base de la fila actual
            fecha = Format(ws.Cells(i, 1).Value, "dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm")
            usuario = Trim(ws.Cells(i, 12).Value)
            
            ' Estructurar la columna de Notas din├ímicamente seg├║n el caso
            If tipoMov = "registro" Then
                nota = "ARQUEO GENERAL DE CAJA"
            Else
                ' Une el motivo y los detalles (Columna N y O) de las Entradas/Retiros
                If detalles <> "" Then
                    nota = UCase(tipoMov) & ": " & motivo & " (" & detalles & ")"
                Else
                    nota = UCase(tipoMov) & ": " & motivo
                End If
            End If
            
            ' MATEM├üTICA EN ACCI├ôN: Sumar el valor real de las piezas de efectivo de esa fila
            monto = (Val(ws.Cells(i, 2).Value) * 1000) + (Val(ws.Cells(i, 3).Value) * 500) + _
                    (Val(ws.Cells(i, 4).Value) * 200) + (Val(ws.Cells(i, 5).Value) * 100) + _
                    (Val(ws.Cells(i, 6).Value) * 50) + (Val(ws.Cells(i, 7).Value) * 20) + _
                    (Val(ws.Cells(i, 8).Value) * 10) + (Val(ws.Cells(i, 9).Value) * 5) + _
                    (Val(ws.Cells(i, 10).Value) * 2) + (Val(ws.Cells(i, 11).Value) * 1)
            
            ' Inyectar los datos calculados en la lista de la pantalla
            Me.lstRetiros.AddItem
            Me.lstRetiros.List(Me.lstRetiros.ListCount - 1, 0) = fecha
            Me.lstRetiros.List(Me.lstRetiros.ListCount - 1, 1) = usuario
            Me.lstRetiros.List(Me.lstRetiros.ListCount - 1, 2) = FormatCurrency(monto, 2)
            Me.lstRetiros.List(Me.lstRetiros.ListCount - 1, 3) = nota
        End If
    Next i
End Sub
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO UserForm11.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm11'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Public Confirmado As Boolean ' Guarda la decisi├│n en memoria

Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    ' Al arrancar, asumimos que no ha confirmado
    Confirmado = False
End Sub

Private Sub btnAceptarSalida_Click()
    Confirmado = True
    Me.Hide ' Oculta la ventana manteniendo la memoria viva para Module 3
End Sub

Private Sub btnCancelarSalida_Click()
    Confirmado = False
    Me.Hide ' Oculta la ventana manteniendo la memoria viva para Module 3
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)
    ' Candado: Si cierran el cuadro con la "X", cuenta como Cancelar
    If CloseMode = vbFormControlMenu Then
        Cancel = True
        Confirmado = False
        Me.Hide
    End If
End Sub

VBA MACRO UserForm12.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm12'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Public Confirmado As Boolean ' Guarda la decisi├│n en memoria
Public MotivoSeleccionado As String
Public DetallesEscritos As String

Private Sub Label32_Click()

End Sub

Private Sub lblMensajeEntrada_Click()

End Sub

Private Sub txtDetallesEntrada_Change()

End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    ' Al arrancar el formulario, limpiamos la memoria
    Confirmado = False
    
    ' Cargamos las opciones por defecto al cuadro desplegable (cmbMotivoEntrada)
    With cmbMotivoEntrada
        .Clear
        .AddItem "Feria Inicial"
        .AddItem "Refuerzo de Caja"
        .AddItem "Aportaci├│n de Socio"
        .AddItem "Pr├®stamo Interno"
        .AddItem "Otro Motivo"
    End With
End Sub

Private Sub btnAceptarEntrada_Click()
    ' Validar estrictamente que hayan seleccionado o escrito un motivo
    If cmbMotivoEntrada.ListIndex = -1 And Trim(cmbMotivoEntrada.Value) = "" Then
        MsgBox "Por favor, seleccione o escriba el motivo del ingreso antes de continuar.", vbExclamation, "Motivo Obligatorio"
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Guardamos los datos capturados en variables p├║blicas antes de ocultar
    Confirmado = True
    MotivoSeleccionado = cmbMotivoEntrada.Value
    DetallesEscritos = txtDetallesEntrada.Value
    
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub btnCancelarEntrada_Click()
    Confirmado = False
    Me.Hide
End Sub

Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)
    ' Si cierran con la "X" de la esquina, equivale a Cancelar
    If CloseMode = vbFormControlMenu Then
        Cancel = True
        Confirmado = False
        Me.Hide
    End If
End Sub

VBA MACRO UserForm13.frm 
in file: xl/vbaProject.bin - OLE stream: 'VBA/UserForm13'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
' ===========================================================================
' ?? VARIABLES P├ÜBLICAS PARA PASAR DATOS A LA MACRO PRINCIPAL
' ===========================================================================
Public Confirmado As Boolean
Public MotivoSeleccionado As String
Public DetallesEscritos As String

' ===========================================================================
' ?? EVENTO CORRECTO AL ARRANCAR: CARGAR LOS MOTIVOS DE TRASPASO
' ===========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_Initialize()
    ' 1. Inicializar banderas de control en falso
    Confirmado = False
    MotivoSeleccionado = ""
    DetallesEscritos = ""
    
    ' 2. Limpiar de forma segura los controles por si acaso
    cmbMotivo.Clear
    txtDetalles.Text = ""
    
    ' 3. ?? Cargar los motivos reales en la lista desplegable
    With cmbMotivo
        .AddItem "Fondo Inicial de Banco"
        .AddItem "Refuerzo de Saldo / Capital Extra"
        .AddItem "Pago de Cliente Electr├│nico"
        .AddItem "Ajuste de Cuenta Bancaria"
        .AddItem "Traspaso entre Terminales"
        .AddItem "Otro Motivo (Especificar abajo)"
    End With
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ? BOT├ôN: CONFIRMAR Y GUARDAR VALORES
' ===========================================================================
Private Sub btnAceptar_Click()
    ' Validaci├│n r├ípida: Obligar a seleccionar un motivo de la lista
    If cmbMotivo.ListIndex = -1 Then
        MsgBox "Por favor, seleccione el motivo de la transferencia antes de continuar.", _
               vbExclamation, "Dato Obligatorio"
        cmbMotivo.DropDown
        Exit Sub
    End If
    
    ' Guardar la informaci├│n en las variables p├║blicas antes de ocultar
    Confirmado = True
    MotivoSeleccionado = cmbMotivo.Text
    DetallesEscritos = Trim(txtDetalles.Text)
    
    ' Ocultar el formulario de la pantalla
    Me.Hide
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ? BOT├ôN: CANCELAR PROCESO
' ===========================================================================
Private Sub btnCancelar_Click()
    Confirmado = False
    Me.Hide
End Sub

' ===========================================================================
' ?? CONTROL DE CIERRE FORZADO (BOT├ôN "X" DE LA VENTANA)
' ===========================================================================
Private Sub UserForm_QueryClose(Cancel As Integer, CloseMode As Integer)
    ' Si el usuario cierra el formulario con la "X", act├║a como si presionara Cancelar
    If CloseMode = vbFormControlMenu Then
        Cancel = True
        Confirmado = False
        Me.Hide
    End If
End Sub

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

+----------+--------------------+---------------------------------------------+
|Type      |Keyword             |Description                                  |
+----------+--------------------+---------------------------------------------+
|AutoExec  |btnAceptar_Click    |Runs when the file is opened and ActiveX     |
|          |                    |objects trigger events                       |
|AutoExec  |Worksheet_Change    |Runs when the file is opened and ActiveX     |
|          |                    |objects trigger events                       |
|Suspicious|Call                |May call a DLL using Excel 4 Macros (XLM/XLF)|
|Suspicious|XoR                 |May attempt to obfuscate specific strings    |
|          |                    |(use option --deobf to deobfuscate)          |
|Suspicious|Hex Strings         |Hex-encoded strings were detected, may be    |
|          |                    |used to obfuscate strings (option --decode to|
|          |                    |see all)                                     |
|Suspicious|Base64 Strings      |Base64-encoded strings were detected, may be |
|          |                    |used to obfuscate strings (option --decode to|
|          |                    |see all)                                     |
|Hex String|b@e7                |62406537                                     |
|Suspicious|VBA Stomping        |VBA Stomping was detected: the VBA source    |
|          |                    |code and P-code are different, this may have |
|          |                    |been used to hide malicious code             |
+----------+--------------------+---------------------------------------------+
VBA Stomping detection is experimental: please report any false positive/negative at https://github.com/decalage2/oletools/issues
